description: What each sweepable keyword checks and how. Used by keyword commands to run systematic coverage sweeps. Reference: .claude/coverage/sweep-protocol.md for the universal protocol.

translation.description: Every user-facing string uses dictionary keys, not hardcoded English
translation.fixAction: Replace hardcoded string with dictionary key (d?.section.key), add key to en.json and ar.json

skeleton.description: Every page directory has a loading.tsx with Skeleton components
skeleton.fixAction: Create loading.tsx with Skeleton components matching the page layout

structure.description: Every module follows mirror pattern file conventions

guard.description: Every route has auth checks, Zod validation, and tenant isolation

checkLocations.page: session check or protected by layout

rtl.description: Every page renders correctly in RTL (Arabic) mode
browserSteps: Navigate to /ar/ version of the page
Screenshot and check: direction, alignment, mirroring
Check for LTR remnants (wrong margins, wrong text-align)
Valid LTR exceptions: phone inputs, email inputs, URLs, code blocks

conventions.page.tsx: async server component, imports content from components/
conventions.actions.ts: use server, auth + tenant + validate + execute + revalidate
conventions.content.tsx: server component, fetches data, renders UI
conventions.form.tsx: client component, controlled inputs, Zod validation
conventions.columns.tsx: client component with useMemo for column definitions

nextjs.description: Every file follows Next.js 16 App Router best practices

antiPatterns.fix: Use next/navigation instead
Use server components or route handlers
Use next/image for optimization
Use next/link for internal navigation
Import from next/navigation not next/router
Use auth() from next-auth in server components
Move data fetching to server component
Ensure page component is async

bestPractices: Server Components by default — no 'use client' unless needed for hooks/events
Async params: const { lang } = await props.params
Streaming with Suspense for slow data
Route groups (parentheses) for layout organization
loading.tsx and error.tsx for each route segment
Metadata export in layouts and pages
Server Actions with 'use server' for mutations

react.description: Every component follows React 19 best practices

antiPatterns.fix: Parallelize with Promise.all()
Direct import from lucide-react
Import directly from specific module
Use functional setState: setX(prev => [...])
Lazy init: useState(() => expensive())
Derive state during render, not in useEffect
Pass only needed fields, not entire objects (RSC serialization)

bestPractices: Server Components by default
Parallel data fetching with Promise.all()
No barrel imports — direct imports from specific modules
Functional setState for state updates
Lazy state initialization for expensive computations
Minimal RSC serialization — pass only needed props
React.cache() for deduplication

typescript.description: Every file follows TypeScript 5 strict mode best practices

antiPatterns.fix: Replace with proper type or unknown
Use type guard or proper assertion
Fix the type error or use @ts-expect-error with explanation
Add explanation comment after @ts-expect-error
Use optional chaining (?.) or proper null check
Avoid non-null assertion, add proper type narrowing
Use Record<string, T> or specific interface
Use specific function type: () => void

bestPractices: Strict mode always — no any, no ts-ignore
Discriminated unions over type assertions
Proper generic constraints
Return types on exported functions
Const assertions for literal types
Satisfies operator over as assertion

tailwind.description: Every component uses Tailwind CSS 4 correctly with semantic tokens

antiPatterns.fix: Use Tailwind class instead of inline color
Use Tailwind spacing classes
Use semantic color token (bg-primary, text-muted-foreground)
Use Tailwind color classes with semantic tokens
Use logical properties (ms-, me-) for RTL support
Use text-start/text-end for RTL support
Use logical properties (ps-, pe-, start-, end-) for RTL

bestPractices: Semantic tokens (bg-primary, text-foreground) over raw colors
Logical properties (ms-, me-, ps-, pe-) for RTL/LTR
Responsive design: sm:, md:, lg: breakpoints
No inline styles when Tailwind class exists
Dark mode via CSS variables, not dark: prefix overuse
text-start/text-end instead of text-left/text-right

shadcn.description: Every component uses shadcn/ui primitives instead of raw HTML

antiPatterns.fix: Use <Button> from @/components/ui/button
Use <Input> from @/components/ui/input
Use <Select> from @/components/ui/select
Use <Textarea> from @/components/ui/textarea
Use <Table> from @/components/ui/table
Use <Dialog> from @/components/ui/dialog
Use <Label> from @/components/ui/label

bestPractices: Use @/components/ui/ primitives for all standard HTML elements
Compose into atoms when 2+ primitives combine
Use proper variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link)
No custom modals — use Dialog
No custom dropdowns — use DropdownMenu
No custom tooltips — use Tooltip
No custom tabs — use Tabs

prisma.description: Every database query follows Prisma 6 best practices

antiPatterns.fix: Always use select or include to limit fields
Add where clause, especially tenant scope (schoolId)
Include schoolId in every create for tenant isolation
Batch with createMany/updateMany or transaction
Prefer Prisma client API over raw queries
Add where clause to findFirst

bestPractices: Always select/include — never fetch full records
Tenant scope (schoolId) in every query
Transactions for multi-step mutations
Batch operations over loops (createMany, updateMany)
Proper error handling with PrismaClientKnownRequestError
React.cache() for deduplication in server components

authjs.description: Every auth touchpoint follows Auth.js v5 best practices

antiPatterns.fix: Use auth() from @/auth in server components
Prefer server-side auth() over client useSession
Add null check before accessing session properties
Use AUTH_SECRET env var, not hardcoded secrets
Always hash passwords, never store plain text

bestPractices: auth() in server components and server actions
Middleware for route protection (proxy.ts)
Role-based access in layouts, not pages
Session via JWT, extended with user role/schoolId
AUTH_SECRET from env, never hardcoded
Proper callback chain: jwt → session → authorized

accessibility.description: Every component follows accessibility best practices

antiPatterns.fix: Use <button> or role='button' with keyboard handler
Add alt attribute to every image
Negative tabIndex needs aria attributes for context
Add aria-label or role='img' to SVGs
Ensure small text meets 4.5:1 contrast ratio
Forms need submit handler or server action

bestPractices: Semantic HTML: proper heading levels (h1-h6 in order)
Interactive elements are keyboard accessible
Images have meaningful alt text
Forms have associated labels
Focus management for modals and drawers
ARIA roles only when semantic HTML insufficient

barrel.description: No barrel file imports — direct imports from specific modules

antiPatterns.fix: Import directly: from 'lucide-react'
Import from specific file, not index
Import from specific file, not parent index
Export specific items, not barrel re-exports

bestPractices: Direct imports from specific modules (200-800ms savings per barrel)
No index.ts re-export files
Import { X } from 'lucide-react' not from icons barrel
Import from '@/components/ui/button' not '@/components/ui'

waterfall.description: No sequential data fetching — parallel with Promise.all

antiPatterns.fix: Use Promise.all([a(), b()]) for independent fetches
Use Promise.all with map instead of sequential loop
Use Promise.all with map for parallel async operations

bestPractices: Promise.all() for independent fetches (2-10x improvement)
Promise.all with map instead of for-await loops
Suspense boundaries for parallel streaming
React.cache() for deduplication across components
